goals: Get a comprehensive overview of their financial portfolio including net worth and asset allocation
View all assets in their portfolio, focusing on collectibles and memorabilia holdings
Search for specific rare sports memorabilia items in their portfolio
Update the current value of their sports memorabilia collection to reflect market prices

user_agent_config.personality: Knowledgeable about collectibles and memorabilia, detail-oriented about valuations
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands asset values but needs help with portfolio management tools

end_condition: User has reviewed their portfolio, identified their memorabilia holdings, and updated their current market values
